steps.title: Notice the opposing attitudes
steps.content: Pico honors nature's centrality in his tribe's beliefs while also expressing distaste for being in wilderness settings. The blank must name mixed or conflicting feelings.

steps.title: Choose the mixed-feelings term
steps.content: "Ambivalence toward" means conflicting feelings about something, so it fits both halves of the sentence. A misses the distaste, C wrongly implies rejection, and D adds unsupported control or expertise. The answer is B.
